task_completion.description: Log in to LimeSurvey and select the 'Vaccine Acceptance and Hesitancy Study' survey.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LimeSurvey admin interface is visible in a web browser, and the 'Vaccine Acceptance and Hesitancy Study' survey is open or selected from the survey list.

task_completion.description: Add Spanish (es) as an additional language for the survey.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the survey settings or general settings, 'Spanish' or 'Español' (es) is listed as an additional language, or a Spanish language tab (es) is visible alongside the base language (en) in the text editing interfaces.

task_completion.description: Translate the survey title and description to Spanish.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The survey text elements (title and description) show Spanish text when the Spanish language tab is selected. The title should contain a keyword like 'vacun'.

task_completion.description: Translate the survey questions to Spanish.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When editing questions in the 'Vaccination Experience' or 'Attitudes and Beliefs' groups, the Spanish language tab is selected and the question text is written in Spanish. Look for evidence of multiple questions being translated.

task_completion.description: Translate the multiple-choice answer options to Spanish.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When editing answer options or subquestions for the survey questions, the Spanish language tab is selected and the options are written in Spanish.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the LimeSurvey web interface, not terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database queries to modify the survey.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MySQL commands, curl requests, or database manipulation scripts.

integrity.description: The agent provided genuine Spanish translations.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text entered in the Spanish fields is actually in Spanish, not just English text copied over or random characters.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target survey: 'Vaccine Acceptance and Hesitancy Study'. Target language: Spanish ('es'). The translated survey title must contain the keyword 'vacun' (e.g., vacuna, vacunación). At least 6 out of 8 questions must be translated into Spanish for full credit. The survey instrument is based on the WHO SAGE Working Group on Vaccine Hesitancy determinants framework.
